raw_consumer_statement: CITI, through Best Buy, issued a credit card in my name that I only used twice in-store. I received a notice that my membership was renewing and I called to close the account and membership. I have since received multiple statements, each with higher fees, for software that I did not request, have not downloaded and not used because I already own the software they claim I purchased. I never authorized the purchase and called to cancel the account and membership as soon as I became aware that it was up for renewal. I already opened a complaint previously but they insist I owe the money. I do not believe I owe the money.
